# TG Yard Care (TotalGuard Yard Care)
> Madison, Wisconsin's most dependable yard care company. Professional lawn care, landscaping, gutter services, and seasonal maintenance since 2019.

## Company Overview
- Name: TG Yard Care (TotalGuard Yard Care LLC)
- Founded: 2019
- Location: Madison, WI
- Phone: (608) 535-6057
- Email: totalguardllc@gmail.com
- Website: https://tgyardcare.com
- Rating: 4.9 stars from 127 Google reviews
- Insurance: $1M general liability
- Response Time: 24 hours or less
- Guarantee: 100% satisfaction or free return visit

## Services

### Lawn Care
- Lawn Mowing: Professional weekly mowing with edging, trimming, and clean stripes. Starting at $35/visit. https://tgyardcare.com/services/mowing
- Fertilization: Custom lawn fertilization programs for lush, green growth. Starting at $45/application. https://tgyardcare.com/services/fertilization
- Aeration: Core aeration to reduce soil compaction and improve root health. Starting at $85. https://tgyardcare.com/services/aeration
- Herbicide: Professional weed control treatments targeting broadleaf weeds and crabgrass. Starting at $45/treatment. https://tgyardcare.com/services/herbicide
- Overseeding: Paired with aeration for thicker, healthier lawns.

### Landscaping
- Mulching: Premium garden bed mulch installation with edge definition. Starting at $75/yard. https://tgyardcare.com/services/mulching
- Garden Beds: Design, installation, and maintenance of garden beds. Starting at $150. https://tgyardcare.com/services/garden-beds
- Weeding: Professional garden bed weeding and maintenance. Starting at $40/visit. https://tgyardcare.com/services/weeding
- Pruning: Shrub and small tree pruning for shape and health. Starting at $50/session. https://tgyardcare.com/services/pruning

### Seasonal Services
- Spring Cleanup: Comprehensive spring yard cleanup — debris removal, bed prep, first mow. Starting at $125. https://tgyardcare.com/services/spring-cleanup
- Fall Cleanup: Complete fall yard maintenance — leaf removal, bed prep, winterization. Starting at $150. https://tgyardcare.com/services/fall-cleanup
- Leaf Removal: Professional leaf cleanup and removal. Starting at $75/visit. https://tgyardcare.com/services/leaf-removal
- Snow Removal: Residential and commercial snow plowing and shoveling. Starting at $45/visit. https://tgyardcare.com/services/snow-removal

### Gutter Services
- Gutter Cleaning: Professional gutter cleaning and downspout flushing. Starting at $95. https://tgyardcare.com/services/gutter-cleaning
- Gutter Guards: Gutter guard installation to prevent debris buildup. Starting at $8/linear ft. https://tgyardcare.com/services/gutter-guards

## Service Areas
Madison, Middleton, Waunakee, Monona, Sun Prairie, Fitchburg, Verona, McFarland, Cottage Grove, DeForest, Oregon, Stoughton — all within Dane County, Wisconsin.

## Why Choose TG Yard Care
- Same crew every visit — consistency and accountability
- 24-hour response time on all inquiries
- $1M general liability insurance
- Written quotes before every job — no surprises
- Quality walk-through after every service
- 100% satisfaction guarantee or free return visit
- Locally owned and operated since 2019
- 4.9-star Google rating from 127 verified reviews
- Serving 500+ residential and commercial properties
- Payment accepted: Cash, Check, Credit Card, Venmo

## Commercial Services
TG Yard Care provides full-service commercial property maintenance for offices, HOAs, retail centers, and multi-family properties.
- Commercial Lawn Care: https://tgyardcare.com/commercial/lawn-care
- Commercial Seasonal Services: https://tgyardcare.com/commercial/seasonal
- Commercial Gutter Services: https://tgyardcare.com/commercial/gutters
- Commercial Snow Removal: https://tgyardcare.com/commercial/snow-removal
- Property Enhancement: https://tgyardcare.com/commercial/property-enhancement
- Fertilization & Weed Control: https://tgyardcare.com/commercial/fertilization-weed-control
- Commercial Aeration: https://tgyardcare.com/commercial/aeration
